description: Plugin-distributed hooks for public-sector-govtech. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags govtech anti-patterns (RFP response missing mandatory-section marker, UI/doc with no 508/accessibility note, grant funds with no restriction/tracking note, jargon in plain-language context). Set GOVTECH_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
